ogTitle: Middlemount vs Midge Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Middlemount and Midge Point.
heading: Middlemount vs Midge Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middlemount, Queensland and Midge Point, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middlemount has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Midge Point (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middlemount or Midge Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middlemount has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Midge Point scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middlemount scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Midge Point scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middlemount or Midge Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middlemount has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
